message:
fix(node): correct off-by-one boundary conditions in replay window and lease expiration

Two subtle boundary condition bugs:

- connector/control_channel.rs: Replay window trimming used '>' (strictly
  greater) instead of '>=' when comparing window length to window_size.
  This allowed the window to grow one entry beyond the configured limit
  before trimming. Changed to '>=' so trimming activates as soon as the
  window reaches the configured size.

- connector/lease_conflict.rs: Lease expiration check used '>=' (expires_at
  >= now) which treated a lease as still valid at the exact moment of
  expiration. Changed to '>' so leases are considered expired at their
  expiration timestamp, matching standard lease semantics where the
  expiration instant marks the transition to expired state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
